info.description:
DigitalFX is a multi-currency fintech platform for Central/West Africa.
It combines fiat accounts (XAF, XOF, USD, GBP, EUR), HD crypto wallets (BIP-44 via Rach WaaS),
and stablecoin P2P transfers (USDC/USDT via Rach CaaS ERC-4337 SCWs).
Mobile Money deposits and withdrawals are handled via HUB2 (MTN, Orange).
info.title: DigitalFX API

get.description: Returns the caller's tier limits (individual vs business) and current 24h withdrawal usage.
Returns all fiat accounts (XAF, XOF, USD, GBP, EUR) for the authenticated user.
Returns a single fiat account for the given currency code.
Returns a paginated list of transactions for the given currency account.
Returns a specific transaction by its UUID.

Unified, filterable transaction feed across all wallet types (fiat, crypto, stablecoin). Results are grouped by calendar day (Today / Yesterday / Monday / …). Supports a type filter tab and full-text search.
Returns paginated log of all admin actions (KYC decisions, user disables, staff changes, FX rate updates). Filterable by staff member, resource type, or specific resource ID.

parameters.description: Filter by resource type (kyc, user, staff, withdrawal_rate)
parameters.name: resource

get.description: Returns aggregate platform stats: total/active/disabled users, KYC pipeline counts, transaction volume (30d), new user growth (7d / 30d), and active staff count.
Returns all users whose identity verification status is "under_review" or "submitted" — ready for admin decision.

post.description: Marks the user's identity as verified and activates full account access. Sends a confirmation email to the user.
Marks the user's identity verification as rejected and notifies them with the reason. The user can resubmit.
Clears the admin manual-override flag so the automated provider (Sumsub) can once again set the user's KYC status via webhook. Use this to undo a manual approve/reject and return to hybrid auto mode.
post.summary: Release KYC control back to the provider

get.description: Returns the current (admin-editable) limits for every account tier.

patch.description: Persists new limits for a tier (individual|business). Takes effect within seconds across the platform.

get.description: Returns the full grouped catalogue of every permission the platform understands, plus the two wildcard forms ("*" for full control and "resource:*" per group). Use this to build a granular permission-assignment matrix. Grant "*" to give a staff member complete control of every function, feature and setting.
Returns all role definitions with their default permissions, labels, and descriptions. Use this to populate the role selector in the invite/edit UI.
Returns the default permission list for the named role. Useful for building custom permission selectors.
get.summary: Get permissions for a specific role

get.description: Returns all staff members with their roles, effective permissions, and activity status. Supports optional filtering to include disabled accounts.

post.description: Creates a pending staff member record and sends an invitation email. The invitee must click the link in the email to accept and link their account. Only owner and admin roles can invite staff. You cannot invite someone as "owner".
Links the authenticated user's account to the pending staff member record identified by the invite token. Must be called after login/registration.

get.description: Returns the full profile for a single staff member including their effective permissions (role defaults minus revocations plus custom grants).

patch.description: Changes the role or fine-tunes the permission set (custom grants and revocations) for a staff member. Cannot be used to modify the owner account. Omit a field to leave it unchanged.
patch.summary: Update a staff member's role or permissions

post.description: Deactivates a staff member's access. Subsequent API requests from that account will be rejected with 403. The account can be re-enabled at any time. The owner cannot be disabled.
Restores access for a previously disabled staff member.

get.description: Full user list with search, KYC status filter, and active/disabled filter. Returns paginated AdminUserView items. Staff can only see users (not each other's admin accounts — those are in /admin/staff).

parameters.description: Search by name, email, or phone
parameters.name: search

get.description: Returns complete user profile including fiat accounts, WaaS wallets, CaaS wallet status, KYC state, and lifetime transaction stats.

post.description: Switches a user between individual and business tiers (changes their default limits and unlocks/locks business features).

Soft-disables the user (sets is_active = false). All subsequent auth attempts are blocked. Existing sessions are invalidated. A reason is logged in the audit trail. The account can be re-enabled at any time.
Restores access for a previously disabled user. Does not restore any suspended sessions — the user must log in fresh.
Sets the user's kyc_status back to "pending" so they can resubmit identity documents. Use when documents are unreadable or the wrong document type was submitted.

get.description: Returns a user's effective limits, the tier default they derive from, and any per-user override.

put.description: Creates or replaces a per-user limit override. Null fields inherit the tier limit.

delete.description: Removes a per-user override so the user falls back to their tier limits.

get.description: Returns paginated transaction history across all fiat accounts for the user. Used by compliance and support staff for investigation.
get.summary: List transactions for a specific user (admin view)

get.description: Returns all configured withdrawal FX rates (active and inactive).

post.description: Creates or replaces the admin-controlled conversion rate for a
post.summary: Set or update a business FX rate for fiat withdrawals

post.description: Exchanges a 2FA pending ref (from /auth/login) + a TOTP code for a full JWT pair.

get.description: Returns all active login sessions with device name, IP, and last activity.

delete.description: Revokes all active sessions except the current one.
Revokes a specific login session. The device is signed out on next token refresh.

post.description: Sends a new 6-digit code to the authenticated user's registered email address.
Confirms the 6-digit OTP sent to the user's email and marks it as verified.
Sends a 6-digit reset code to the registered email. Accepts email or phone. Always returns 200 to prevent account enumeration.

Verifies a Google ID token (from the mobile SDK or web client). Creates an account on first sign-in or logs into the existing linked account. New users must complete KYC before financial features unlock.

parameters.description: Google ID token from the client SDK
parameters.name: body

post.description: Authenticates with phone + PIN. Creates a device session and sends a login notification email. Returns a JWT pair with a session_id for device management.
Revokes the current device session. The refresh token is immediately invalidated; access token remains valid until expiry (max 30 min). A sign-out notification email is sent.
Sends a 6-digit OTP to the phone number via SMS. Required before register.
Confirms the OTP sent to the phone. Call before register for new users.

Creates a new user account (individual or business), provisions fiat accounts, and returns a JWT pair. Set account_type to "individual" or "business". Business accounts require company-level fields; director info and documents are submitted post-signup via /business/* endpoints.
Verifies the 6-digit OTP and sets a new PIN. All active sessions are revoked. A confirmation email is sent.
Issues a new rotated access + refresh token pair. The old refresh token is invalidated. Validates the session is still active.

get.description: Rich analytics reserved for business accounts: insights plus transaction stats, per-currency volume/balance breakdowns, and limits usage. Returns 403 for individual accounts.
Returns the USDC balance of the caller's ERC-4337 Smart Contract Wallet from the CaaS service.
Returns the 8 most recent recipients of CaaS phone-to-phone stablecoin transfers. Used to populate the quick-pick contact chips in the Phone Send widget.

post.description: Step 4–5 of the Instant USD Account flow. Initiates a HUB2 Mobile Money collection: the customer receives a push-to-pay prompt on their phone. After they approve, HUB2 fires a webhook which triggers DigitalFX to instruct Rach CaaS to convert the XOF/XAF to USDC/USDT and credit the customer's ERC-4337 Smart Contract Wallet. The customer sees their updated balance via GET /crypto/balances once Rach CaaS confirms the fiat and completes the OTC conversion.
post.summary: Fund Instant USD Account via Mobile Money

201.description: HUB2 collection reference — poll status or wait for balance update

post.description: Transfers stablecoins (USDT or USDC) from the caller to another DigitalFX user identified by phone number. An FX quote is obtained first, then the CaaS P2P transfer is executed. Amount is in USD-equivalent decimal (e.g. "50.00").
post.summary: Send USDT or USDC to another user

get.description: Returns a paginated list of crypto (USDT/USDC) transactions for the authenticated user.
Returns a single crypto transaction by its UUID.
Returns the caller's ERC-4337 Smart Contract Wallet (SCW), provisioning it on the CaaS service if this is the first call. The wallet is identified by the user's phone number.
get.summary: Get or create ERC-4337 abstraction wallet

post.description: Initiates a stablecoin (USDC/USDT) off-ramp withdrawal from the user's ERC-4337 Smart Contract Wallet to their Mobile Money number.

get.description: Single aggregate endpoint for the home screen. Returns asset allocation (fiat + crypto), fiat wallet balances (Nilos), CaaS USDC balance (Phone Send), this month's income/spending summary, virtual card details, recent P2P contacts, and a unified activity feed.

post.description: Converts fiat currency between the user's own accounts using a Nilos swap. The from and to accounts must both exist. Optionally pass a quote_id to lock the rate shown in the preview; otherwise the swap executes at the current market rate.

get.description: Returns the user's fiat exchange history with aggregate stats (total exchanges, volume, fees paid) and transactions grouped as THIS WEEK / LAST WEEK / EARLIER. Each row shows from/to currencies, amounts, rate used, and status.

post.description: Returns a locked FX quote for a specific amount. The quote_id can be passed to POST /exchange/execute to guarantee the displayed rate. Quotes expire quickly — execute immediately after confirming.

get.description: Returns the live FX rate for 1 unit of the source currency converted to the target currency. Rate is sourced from Nilos (green dot = live); falls back to internal rates if Nilos is unavailable.

parameters.description: Source currency (USD, EUR, GBP, XAF, XOF)
parameters.name: from

get.description: Full analytics payload for the Financial Insights screen. Returns: summary cards (total balance, income, spending, net flow), balance trend data points (Fiat + Crypto lines) for chart rendering, asset allocation (fiat % vs crypto %), monthly cash flow (last 6 months income vs spending), and spending breakdown by type (Send/Exchange/Withdraw/Deposit split by fiat vs crypto).
Returns all identity documents submitted by the authenticated user.

post.description: Records a KYC document for manual review. The doc_url should be a GCS signed URL or object path obtained from the client-side upload flow.
Creates (or returns an existing) MetaMap applicant for the user. The returned identity_access token is used with the MetaMap mobile SDK to launch the verification flow.

get.description: Returns the current KYC verification status for the authenticated user. Possible values: pending, approved, rejected.
Returns paginated notifications for the authenticated user. Pass ?unread=true to filter unread only. Response includes an unread badge count.

patch.description: Marks every unread notification for the authenticated user as read.

get.description: Returns the number of unread notifications. Use for the badge dot on the bell icon.

patch.description: Marks a single notification as read. Only the owning user can mark their own notifications.

get.description: Returns the full profile of the authenticated user including bio, avatar, and KYC/email verification status.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile fields: name, bio, avatar URL, date of birth, and nationality.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's app preferences (language, dark mode, biometrics).

patch.description: Updates one or more app preferences. Omitted fields are left unchanged. Supported languages: en, fr, es, ar, pt. Dark mode values: always | never | system.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's referral code, aggregate reward points, total referrals count, and list of referred users.
Returns a paginated list of point ledger entries (credits and debits) for the authenticated user.
Returns whether 2FA and biometrics are enabled for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Verifies a live TOTP code and deactivates two-factor authentication.

post.description: Verifies the first TOTP code from the authenticator app and activates 2FA on the account.
Generates a TOTP secret and OTP URI. Encode the URI as a QR code and scan it in an authenticator app, then call /security/2fa/confirm to activate.

delete.description: Removes the biometrics enabled flag from user preferences.

post.description: Marks biometric authentication as enabled in user preferences. Actual biometric credential management is handled on the device.
Verifies the current PIN and sets a new one. Does not revoke existing sessions.

get.description: Returns active FAQ entries. Pass ?category= to filter (general | account | payment | kyc | technical | card).
Returns URLs for Privacy Policy, Help Center, and Terms of Use.
Returns the authenticated user's support tickets, newest first.

post.description: Creates a new support ticket with an opening message. Category: general | account | payment | kyc | technical | card.

get.description: Returns a specific support ticket and its full message thread.

post.description: Adds a message to an open support ticket.
Swaps tokens from the authenticated user's WaaS wallet. Routing (DEX vs bridge) is internal; you get a tx hash. Slippage is auto-protected at 99.5% of a live quote unless amount_out_min is set.

get.description: The authenticated user's paginated swap history.
Returns the best available price for a pair. Tokens may be symbols or 0x addresses; amount is human units (e.g. "5") or amount_in for base units.
Symbols you can use instead of raw contract addresses, per chain. Omit chain for all chains.
Returns all staff members invited or active for this business.

post.description: Links an authenticated user to a pending staff invite using the invite token.
Sends an invite to a new staff member for this business account.

get.description: Returns all available roles and the permissions they carry.

delete.description: Removes a staff member from the business account.

put.description: Updates the role of an existing staff member within the business account.

post.description: Converts between supported fiat currencies at the current FX rate. Rate provider integration is pending.
Initiates either a collection (deposit) or disbursement (withdrawal) via the HUB2 Mobile Money gateway for XAF/XOF operators (MTN, Orange).
Transfers fiat funds between two DigitalFX users using their phone numbers. Both sender and receiver must have an account in the requested currency.
Multipart upload of a KYC document, avatar, or other file. Returns the stored object path and a time-limited signed URL to read it. Pass the object or read_url to /kyc/documents, PATCH /profile, etc.

get.description: Returns a fresh time-limited URL to download a previously uploaded object.
Returns all on-chain HD wallets (BIP-44) provisioned for the authenticated user via the Rach WaaS service.

post.description: Provisions an HD wallet seed (if not already created) and derives a deposit address for the given blockchain network. Idempotent — safe to call again for the same network.
post.summary: Create HD wallet for a network

get.description: Returns the wallet header (live balance, receive address, actions) for a WaaS crypto wallet. Balance is fetched live from the Payments API.

parameters.description: Network (BTC, ETH, SOL, LTC, TRX, POL, BCH, XRP)
parameters.name: network

get.description: Returns on-chain transaction history from the Payments API (WaaS) for a specific network.

post.description: Initiates a Mobile Money collection (deposit) via HUB2, crediting the user's fiat account when confirmed. Returns the HUB2 reference for webhook correlation.

get.description: Returns the wallet header (balance, account number, actions) for a specific fiat currency.

parameters.description: Currency code (USD, EUR, GBP, XAF, XOF)
parameters.name: currency

get.description: Returns the transaction history for a fiat wallet with time-period grouping (THIS WEEK / LAST WEEK / EARLIER) and aggregate stats (In / Out / Total). Filterable by type and full-text search.
Returns the Phone Send card (USDC balance + recent contacts) plus the unified wallet list (fiat + stablecoins + crypto). Filter with ?type=fiat|stablecoin|crypto.
Returns the wallet header for a stablecoin (USDC). Balance is fetched live from Rach CaaS.
Returns CaaS P2P send/receive history for the USDC stablecoin wallet. Maps to the same data as GET /crypto/transactions.
Returns all addable assets (crypto networks + stablecoins) with has_wallet=true if the user has already provisioned that wallet. Used for the + Add flow.

post.description: Broadcasts a swap transaction from the caller's WaaS wallet using a previously quoted route.

get.description: Returns the caller's paginated swap transaction history.
Returns a rate quote for swapping tokens across chains using WaaS swap.
get.summary: Get a WaaS token swap quote

post.description: Initiates a Mobile Money disbursement (withdrawal) via HUB2, debiting the user's fiat balance.

get.description: Returns the deposit address details for the specified wallet ID.

post.description: Receives Mobile Money payment status updates from HUB2. On a COLLECTION SUCCESSFUL event, DigitalFX automatically credits the user's CaaS USDC wallet. The request must carry a valid HMAC-SHA256 signature in the X-Hub2-Signature header.

Receives verification result events from the configured KYC provider (Sumsub). The provider's decision is recorded and, unless an admin has taken manual control, applied to the user's KYC status (hybrid auto-approval). Signature is verified inside the provider.
Receives verification result events from MetaMap. Updates KYC status to approved or rejected.
Handles transaction updates (detected/confirmed deposits) pushed by the Payments WaaS microservice.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of the caller's fiat withdrawal requests.

post.description: Initiates a withdrawal from the user's Nilos-backed fiat account

get.description: Returns all saved withdrawal destinations (banks and mobile money

post.description: Saves a bank account or mobile money number for quick repeat
Returns the exact fee and destination amount for a withdrawal

get.summary: Get a fiat withdrawal by ID

reason.example: Document image is blurry or expired

flat_fee.description: e.g. 0.50 flat fee in source currency

body.example: I sent $50 two days ago and it hasn't arrived.

category.description: Category one of: general account payment kyc technical card

network.description: Network is the blockchain network. Supported: BTC BCH LTC BSC ETH POL TRX SOL XRP

quote_id.description: QuoteID is optional. Pass the quote_id from POST /exchange/quote to lock the rate.

side.description: Side: SELL = you specify source amount, BUY = you specify target amount

currency.description: Currency of the Mobile Money deposit: XOF or XAF

operator.description: Operator is the Mobile Money provider

phone.description: Phone is the Mobile Money number to pull from (E.164)

token.description: Token is the target stablecoin — defaults to USDC

doc_type.description: DocType one of: national_id | passport | selfie | proof_of_address

doc_url.description: DocURL is the GCS object path or signed URL returned by the upload endpoint

company_legal_name.description: Business accounts only — company-level KYB fields collected at signup.

token.description: Token must be USDT or USDC

biometrics_enabled.description: BiometricsEnabled toggles fingerprint / Face ID unlock

dark_mode.description: DarkMode one of: always never system

language.description: Language one of: en fr es ar pt

amount.description: Amount is the stablecoin amount to withdraw (decimal string)

payout_mobile.description: PayoutMobile is the Mobile Money number to disburse fiat to (E.164)

token.description: Token must be USDT or USDC

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token — prefix with "Bearer ": Bearer eyJhbGci...
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
